page: Google Cloud Platform m3-ultramem-128 is a memory-optimized virtual machine designed for memory-intensive enterprise workloads. It features 128 vCPUs mapped to 64 physical cores of an Intel Xeon processor running at 2.6 GHz on the x86_64 architecture. The system is equipped with 3904.0 GB of RAM, providing a high memory-to-vCPU ratio of 30.5 GB per core. It does not include local storage or dedicated GPU hardware.

Benchmark data shows strong multi-core performance, with a stress-ng multi-core score of 120764.87 and a Passmark CPU score of 83553.05. Memory bandwidth is highly efficient, reaching 6533.9 GB/sec for cached small-block reads and 298.34 GB/sec for uncached large-block reads. Cryptographic capabilities are notable, with a top-tier Passmark CPU encryption score of 103896.01. However, single-core performance is moderate, as reflected by average ratings in Geekbench single-core and stress-ng single-core tests. Additionally, while prompt processing for large language models is average, text generation for a 70B model is weak at 2.73 tokens per second due to the lack of GPU acceleration.

From a cost-efficiency perspective, this server offers high resource density for workloads requiring massive memory footprints, reducing the need to distribute databases across multiple smaller nodes. It is highly suited for large in-memory databases, enterprise resource planning systems, heavy multi-threaded data processing, and Redis deployments, where it achieves 106.82 million operations per second.
description: Google Cloud Platform m3-ultramem-128 is a memory-optimized server configured with 128 vCPUs and 3904.0 GB of RAM, delivering 30.5 GB of memory per core. Powered by an Intel Xeon x86_64 processor running at 2.6 GHz, this instance features 64 physical cores with hyper-threading enabled. It does not include local storage or GPUs. Performance benchmarks indicate strong multi-core capabilities, with a stress-ng multi-core score of 120764.87 and a Passmark CPU score of 83553.05. Memory bandwidth is highly efficient, reaching 298.34 GB/sec for uncached large-block reads. While single-core performance is average, the server excels in memory-bound operations, making it highly suitable for large-scale in-memory databases, Redis deployments, and enterprise resource planning applications.
og_description: Google Cloud Platform m3-ultramem-128 is a memory-optimized server with 128 vCPUs and 3904 GB RAM, delivering strong multi-core performance and high memory bandwidth for enterprise databases.
meta_description: Google Cloud Platform m3-ultramem-128 features 128 vCPUs and 3904 GB RAM, optimized for large-scale in-memory databases and enterprise workloads.
tagline: A high-density memory-optimized server featuring massive RAM capacity and strong multi-core processing for enterprise in-memory databases.
bullet_points: 128 vCPUs and 3904 GB of RAM providing 30.5 GB per core
Intel Xeon x86_64 processor with 64 physical cores at 2.6 GHz
Strong multi-core performance and high memory read bandwidth
No local storage or GPU accelerators included
Best suited for large-scale in-memory databases and Redis deployments
